entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam on SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Coding
entry.content:
Note: We have reached our maximum registration capacity and RSVP for this event and the resgistration is now closed. For those who could not sign up this time, please wait for the next announcement in this region.

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of SAP Build, specifically about creating apps and business processes without coding (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A Business process (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • A Business App  (SAP Build Apps).
  • (Demo) A business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

    You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build Artifacts, and get a deep understanding of all 3 SAP Build tools and how they work together.

    • SAP Build Process Automation: Learn how to drag and drop activities to build business processes in minutes, how to trigger the processes, and how to send approval forms to users.
    • SAP Build Apps: Learn how to drag and drop components to build UIs in minutes, enable SAP BTP authentication, use destinations to access SAP backend data and services, and more.
    • SAP Build Work Zone: Learn about business site and workspace in a Demo. 

 

Pre-requisites:

Please bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome, Firefox etc. installed on your laptop.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday, February 16th, 2024 from 09:30 - 16:00 hours IST. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Event Address: Walmart Global Tech - Pardhanani Wilshire II (PW2), Cessna business park, Kaverappa Layout, Kadubeesanahalli, Kadabeesanahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560103. Meeting Room: "DC-PW-11F-Training Room-01"

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @eshrinivasan and @Rekha_DR .

The event is kindly being hosted by Walmart Global Tech, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you are willing to attend, Register by clicking Yes button in the Will you be attending? section.

entry.title: 🇮🇳 Invite to take part in "SAP Build CodeJam" at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, INDIA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Developers,
Are you interested in Learning about SAP BTP Build? SAP Developer Advocates are conducting "SAP Build CodeJam" at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, India.
Please follow the link
https://groups.community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-codejam-on-sap-build-create-apps-and-processes-without-coding/ev-p/310747 to Register and take part in the event and for more details...

Thank you and Best Regards,

Rekha DR

entry.title: SAP has Successfully Delivered SAP Build CodeJam at Walmart Global Tech, Bangalore
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

On 16th Feb of this month SAP Developer Advocates team has Successfully Delivered "SAP Build CodeJam" at Walmart Global Tech, Bangalore.

Key highlights of CodeJams: 

1. One day onsite "Free of Cost" upskilling programs offered by SAP to Upskill SAP Professionals on BTP

2. ABAP Cloud, SAP Build, CAP are the topics offered in APJ.

30 SAP Professionals from  Walmart Global Tech and other organizations like Daimler Truck, Nokia, Applied Materials etc also took part in this initiative. 

Thank you Walmart Global Tech, Bangalore for hosting this event! 

Would you like to know more about CodeJams and Host One? 

Tap on this link: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/gh-p/code-jam

CodeJam Line up Across world for this year 2024: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/eb-p/codejam-events

entry.title: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge – April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hello everybody! 

Do you love challenges? We have a cool one for you!

Starting this day "SAP Build Apps on BTP" Developer's challenge where you get to try your hands on SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP "Free Trial".

The challenges so far:

  • Task 0: Set Up SAP Build Apps
  • Task 1: OData 
  • Task 2: Formulas 
  • Task 3: Theming, Styling and Layout Design 
  • Task 4: Mobile device capabilities (Final one!)

What you will learn during this month long challenge?

  1. How to set up SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP free trial.
  2. How to import  SAP Build App Project
  3. How to connect to OData APIs of SAP Backend systems
  4. How to Theme and Layout your SAP Build App
  5. How to use native device capabilities like Camera

… and many more capabilities..

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0

entry.title: Re: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge- April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hello Developers,
The first week's challenge is posted !
It's about working with S/4HANA Cloud OData services which is a very critical topic...

  • Task 1: OData

entry.title: Re: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge- April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

For this month SAP Build community challenge, 2nd Week challenge ( Task 2) is out! Check this ...

  • Task 2: Formulas

entry.title: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content:
The challenge is now over. See our wrap-up blog.

Hello Everybody!

We hope you’re enjoying the SAP Build Apps Developers Challenge so far.

Today, we’d like to change directions and focus on theming and layout design of your app, a very interesting topic that is critical both to “offer” the value of your app and a great User experience (UX) for the users. The app we are going to work with looks like this on the SAP Build Preview App on Mobile device.

We will give you a skeleton app and will want you to fix up the UI. This skeleton app will also be used next week, where you’ll learn about native capabilities and connect it to APIs to create an app called NearbyApp using which you can find relaxation/entertainment spots around your locality.

The challenges so far:

  • Task 0: Set Up SAP Build Apps
  • Task 1: OData 
  • Task 2: Formulas
  • Task 3: Theming, Styling and Layout Design   (this post)   
  • Task 4: Mobile device capabilities ( full and final one! )                                                                                           

To handle the look and feel of your app, there are several concepts you need to understand, as well as several SAP Build Apps tools that we’d like to make sure you are aware of.

Theme: A theme is pre-designed template that determines the overall look and feel of an application/app. The purpose of a theme is to create unity across web pages through the consistent use of a color palette, fonts, and layout patterns.

When you’re creating your application, you can define once how you want it to look based on your company’s brand or the design guidelines of your project. If you change the main theme, all the components that you’ve used will automatically adapt and follow the guidelines, down to the color system, typography, backgrounds, and more.

Theme Tab: This is where you can change themes to the latest SAP Fiori themes. Here it is also possible to adjust colors, theme variables and font settings for the entire theme.

Style Tab:  Is used for setting background colors, text colors, typography of text of the UI components like cards, buttons and headings.

Style Classes: A style class defines values for all the style properties of a UI component on how it looks: font, colors, borders and so on. You can reuse the same style class to style all the other UI components of same type.

For example, once you set the background color and text color for a button, you can save this as a New Style and reuse this style class for the rest of the buttons. This is cool and time efficient – and you will do this for this challenge!

Smart Colors: There is a system in the SAP Build apps to take care of the color contrast automatically. Based on the background color, the text color is matched intelligently.

For example, for the Brand background which is blue in color, if you set Secondary text which is also blue color, the app intelligently resolves to the text color white to provide a contrast to the text for readability.

If you set Neural High Contrast (black) text for the dark mode (black) background, it resolves to white color.

Layout Tab: Here you can design the layout of the app, like spaces between components, width and height of the components, position of the components and so forth. In this challenge, you will use it to set the gaps between the buttons.

For more information on theming tools, see this blog.
For more information on building SAP Fiori apps with SAP Build Apps, see this blog. 

👉 Your Task
We will give you an app that looks dull, boring and unformatted. Your job is to change its look and feel and make it beautiful!

Here are the changes to the Home Page to be made:

Here are the changes to the Details page to be made:

Download and import your skeleton NearbyApp into your SAP Build Lobby.

It’s time to get started with your task!

Your Task List

To help you get started, here’s a quick example of what you’ll need to do.

  1. Open the app and change its theme from SAP Quartz light to SAP Morning Horizon. You can test if the theme is changed in the Web App Preview.

  2.  In the UI Canvas, select Page Layout in the tree view (this represents the page), and create a custom background color. To create a custom color, select the current color and choose New Palette. Make the color Hex value #03093E and call it Deep Blue.

  3. In the Home Page UI, select the Card UI component, and give it a background image (Google a cool landscape picture of your location/city landscape). We are curious to see the picture of your location!
     
  4. Select the Cafes button, and change its background color to Secondary background (in the Universal palette) and change the text color of the Button to ICON (under SAP Morning horizon). Create a new style based on your changes and call it Button Colors.
  5. Reuse Button Colors style for the other 3 Buttons Movies, Bars, Restaurants.
  6. Select the Large Image List Item, and change its background color to Secondary background.
  7. On the Details Page, set the Page Layout background color to Deep Blue.
  8. Set all title and text colors to TEXT WHITE. You can create a new style and reuse it for all other components of the same type. Apply the Button Colors Style class created earlier to Check Distance button as well.
  9. Back on the home page, select the Cafes button. Under the Layout tab, add horizontal spacing both and left and right side to S-8px. Repeat for all the other buttons.

After all your theming and styling, the app should look like this – isn’t it visually appealing and wonderful!?

Now showcase your own work! 

  1. Switch to Variables and set the initial value of the app variable communityID initial value to your own SAP community ID. 
  2. Preview your app, either on Web Preview or on the mobile Preview App, and take 2 screenshots: One of the home page and one of the details page.
  3. In your project, go to the Home Page and select Page Layout in the tree view.Under the Style tab, you’ll see the Background Color attribute. If you want to create your own custom color for this background, which menu item do you click from the dropdown? Hint: This menu item has the icon . The name of the menu item is the string you need to hash. To do the hash, click # Generate Hash in the Navigation bar. Enter your answer in the String to Hash field in all caps with a space between two words, so that if as an example your answer were Create Color, you would hash CREATE COLOR.

 4. Post the screenshots and your hash as a reply to this discussion.

Great and Congrats! You have now completed Week 3 Developer’s challenge successfully.

Next week you will be adding the Logic to this App to find the Activities around your Location by connecting it to a real API and using the location services (GPS) on your mobile.

Thank you for taking part in this SAP Build Apps Developer's Challenge!

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Kolkata, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION IS NOW CLOSED FOR THIS EVENT!

This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • We will also demo a business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP, S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data

 

  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday, May 30th from 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM hours local time in India (IST). The language of the event and the content will be English.

 

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

 

Location 

Event Address: 

Cognizant Technology Solutions, Module 6, G1 Building, 6th Floor, Candor Kolkata One Hi –Tech Structures Pvt Ltd, Candor TechSpace IT/ITES SEZ, Tower G1, Plot No.DH-1, DH-2, DH-3 , DH-3/1, Block No. DH, Action Area I, New Town (Entrance Gate 2), Kolkata

The number of seats is limited to 30.

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @eshrinivasan and @Rekha_DR 

The event is kindly being hosted by Cognizant Technology Solutions– thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. The 30 participants who signed up from this page will receive an email from the instructors/host for entry into the office premises to attend the event.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
You are right! 

Its "Croissant" 🙂

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Code (Bangalore, India)
entry.content:
Note: Dear members, we have a registration capacity of 30 and the registration is now closed.

This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • We will also demo a business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP, S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Tuesday, July 16th from 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM hours local time in India (IST). The language of the event and the content will be English.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location

Event Address: 

TCS Anchor Annex block
International Tech Park Bangalore (ITPB)
ITPL Main Rd,
Pattandur Agrahara,
Whitefield,
Bengaluru,
Karnataka 560066

The number of seats is limited to 30.

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @eshrinivasan & @Rekha_DR 

The event is kindly being hosted by Tata Consultancy Services – thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. The participants who signed up from this page will receive an email from the instructors/host for entry into the office premises to attend the event.

entry.title: 🇮🇳SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Ahmedabad, India)
entry.content:
As we have reached the max. count of 30, REGISTRATION IS NOW CLOSED FOR THIS EVENT!

This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • We will also demo a business site in which you can embed the app (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP, S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for 9th August, Friday from 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM hours local time in India (IST). The language of the event and the content will be English.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location and Event Address: 

TCS Main Building, DA IICT Rd, Infocity, Gandhinagar, Gujarat 382421

The number of seats is limited to 30.

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @Rekha_DR  @sheenamk 

The event is kindly being hosted by Tata Consultancy Services – thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. The participants who signed up from this page will receive an email from the instructors/host for entry into the office premises to attend the event.

entry.title: 🇨🇭SAP Build CodeJam- Lucerne: Create Business Processes, Apps and Websites without Coding
entry.content:
Join Us for the SAP CodeJam in Lucerne

We are thrilled to announce that a SAP CodeJam event on the topic "SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code" will be taking place in Lucerne - and we definitely want you to be there! This is your chance to dive into hands-on learning and network with like-minded individuals and experts.

Why Should You Attend?

SAP CodeJams are known for their informal atmosphere, where learning is fun and creativity is encouraged. By participating, you'll have the opportunity to:

  • Stay up-to-date with the latest SAP technologies
  • Learn directly from SAP experts who will introduce you to a topic both theoretically and practically
  • Engage actively with coding exercises and receive personalized support
  • Network with industry peers and expand your professional connections

Event Details:

  • Date: Wednesday, October 30, 2024
  • Time: 09:00 AM - 4:00 PM
  • Location: KKL, Europaplatz 1, 6003 Lucerne
  • Language: English
  • Lunch & Coffee Breaks: Included

You can find all the details and the registration link below. There are only 26 spots available, so be sure to register early to secure your place:

SAP CodeJam Lucerne

We look forward to spending a great event with you.

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Business Apps, Processes and website without Code(Chennai, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION IS NOW CLOSED FOR THIS EVENT - We will send confirmation emails to first 30 registered participants in couple of weeks. A waitlist will be maintained. In case some of the RSVPs are unable to make it to the event, participants from waiting list will be considered for the event. 

This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience of SAP Build (Low Code/No Code) solutions on SAP BTP like SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone for building Apps, business processes and business website without coding. 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • A business website (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

 

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to a backend service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Deploy App to BTP

 

  • SAP Build Process Automation
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

 

  • SAP Build Work Zone(Standard Edition)
    • Create site
    • Create page
    • Create space
    • Embed a Build App

Location

Innov8 | Coworking Space in SKCL Techsquare,

Lazer St, South Phase, SIDCO Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600032

 

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • Thank you to Mark9 for hosting SAP CodeJam

Date

Friday, February 7th, 2025, from 9:00 to 16:00 IST

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language of Instruction: English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @Rekha_DR  and @eshrinivasan 

Please note that spaces are limited to 30. 

  • If you would like to attend, Register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these SAP Build prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Business Apps, Processes and website without Code(Chennai, India)
entry.content:
Hello @Ganesh2207 , we will send out today. 

Best Regards,

Rekha DR

entry.title: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION IS NOW CLOSED FOR THIS EVENT - We will send confirmation emails to first 35 registered participants one week before the event. Please comment below in case you want to be considered in the waitlist. If there are any dropouts, we can consider including those in the waitlist.

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned on Tuesday, March 11th in Bengaluru, India 🇮🇳 from 9:00 to 16:00 IST. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is Developer Advocate Nora von Thenen from SAP.

The event is kindly being hosted by TATA Consultancy Services(TCS). Thank you! Please note that spots are limited - we can only accommodate 35 attendees. 

Location : TCS Victor building; ITPL Main Rd, Pattandur Agrahara, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.
